intended_use: Tempus Pixel software is intended to be used as a support tool by trained healthcare professionals to aid in diagnosis. It is intended to provide image and related information that is interpreted by a
intended_use_full: Tempus Pixel software is intended to be used as a support tool by trained healthcare professionals to aid in diagnosis. It is intended to provide image and related information that is interpreted by a trained professional to render findings and/or diagnosis, but it does not directly generate any diagnosis or potential findings.
target_condition: Cardiac pathology requiring T1/T2 parametric mapping; oncologic lesion evaluation and follow-up
ground_truth: FDA-cleared MR scanners (GE 1.5T and 3T, Philips 1.5T and 3T, Siemens 1.5T and 3T) generating reference T1 and T2 maps from the same input series
other_metrics: T1 inline map validation: Mean absolute error = 4.76 ms, 95th percentile absolute error = 13.82 ms, Max absolute error = 28.57 ms (acceptance criteria: 95th percentile within -30ms to +30ms, all measurements within -45ms to +45ms). T2 inline map validation: Mean absolute error = 0.85 ms, 95th percentile absolute error = 2.48 ms, Max absolute error = 2.97 ms (acceptance criteria: 95th percentile within -3ms to +3ms, all measurements within -4.5ms to +4.5ms).
